titleStmt.title: SII 29.97: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 97. (A.R. No. B. 575 of 1961-62.) KURAḌI, MANVI TALUK, RAICHUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab built in to the floor of the Īśvara temple.

This damaged record registers a grant of money by [Nārā]yaṇa bhaṭṭōpādhyāya, son of Sōma-bhaṭṭōpādhyāya to the mahājanas of agrahāra Rūḍi when Chālukya Bhūlokamalla [Sōmēśvara III] was ruling over the empire.
It is dated in the king's regnal year 9, Ānanda, Pushya • • • • • Tuesday, uttarayaṇa saṁkrānti. It corresponds to 1134 A.D., December 25, Tuesday. The tithi was śu. 8.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
soḍare smogeveraḍu
gaḷabāṇa First three lines are engraved on top of the slab.
© svasti samasta bhuvana vikhyāta śrīpṛ
thvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramē
śvaraṁ parama bhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśraya
kuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatsa
rvvajña cakravartti bhūlōkamalladēvara vi
jaya rājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhi pravardhamā
namācaṁdrā salluttamire svastiśrī cā
lukya sarvvajña bhūlōkamalladēva varṣada 9 neyānaṁda saṁva
tsarada puṣya maṁgaḷavāra Uttarāyaṇa saṁkrānti
yaṁdu Ūṟu śrī sōma bhaṭṭōpādhyāya
ra makkaḷu yaṇa bhaṭṭōpādhyāya śrī matsarvva namasya
dagrahāraṁ rūḍiyaśēṣa mahājanaṁgaḷge poṁge tiṁgaḷge
ka vṛddhiyiṁ poṁgadyāṇa
ṟa vṛddhiyā Contains the sketch of a dagger pointing down to the length of the slab.
very badly damaged
Digital edition of SII 29.97 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
